summary: The diff implements auto-clear on mount for most of the required forms. ShiftFormModal, StaffFormModal (new entry), PurchaseOrderFormModal, SupplierFormModal (new entry), and Expenses modal all have useEffect-based resets. StaffFormModal and SupplierFormModal also correctly pre-populate when editing. However, there is no evidence in the diff that RecordSaleModal or RegisterCustomerModal received the auto-clear useEffect treatment in this change set.

missing_requirements.requirement: Opening RecordSaleModal shows all fields blank with no pre-populated fuel type, quantity, payment method, pump number, or staff values.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary for RecordSaleModal describes 'pre-filled price per litre from inventory' suggesting pre-population exists, and there is no explicit useEffect reset on mount documented for new entries in RecordSaleModal.

missing_requirements.requirement: Opening RegisterCustomerModal for a new customer shows all fields blank.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary for RegisterCustomerModal only mentions form validation and edit/add mode support with no mention of a useEffect reset to blank fields on mount for new customer entry. The file content is not shown in the diff so there is no evidence the auto-clear was implemented.
